reviews.review_text:
As a poker game goes it has it all. + Some blackjack.  Collecting hats  ,badges ( i don't need no stinking Badges) Coins etc all adds to it. Wasted many hours.  My only down side is  The amount of people who just throw in all the chips every hand. 
but once you weed them out the game you find some damn good Players who just want to have fun.

If you like poker but dont want to use real cash This is as close as it gets. and if you do run out of Free  chips . you can allways buy a few more. or wait for a ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ to come around every 4 hours.

I enjoy Governor of Poker 3.  Best poker game on steam.

Yes, they try at every turn to get micro-transactions out of you.  Just don't buy them.
I have not spent one cent on this game and have 1,000,000 in chips quite comfortably.
Plus, they give you free chips every 4 hours and bonus spins every day or so for chance at free extra chips.

Are there bots?  The only reason I have thought there are bots is because I've read the various reviews here on Steam that claim there are bots.  I have seen no evidence of this.  I win some, I lose some.  Kinda like regular old poker.  I could be wrong, but the game seems legit.

Play the Sit&Go tournaments if you want cash.  I've made all my money this way.  They are cheap and they pay out nicely if you win and you get your chips back if you place second.  Brings me back to the old poker games I played on xbox live years ago.

I never have a hard time finding a game.

The graphics ain't great, but they are acceptable.  Good enough for a poker game.  Only a small amount of customization for your toon, though some of the hats look fun.  They cost a lot, again in a push for micro-transactions.  If you can find the will to resist (which I have quite easily) you can eventually earn these hats for free.

The only reason I've ever thought the cards are rigged is because other reviewers have claimed as such.  I am no card counter, just a casual poker player of average skill.  I have seen no evidence of unfair cards.  At least, not any more than poker from any deck, physical or digital.  Getting screwed or getting saved in a deus ex machina scenario is what makes poker fun.  That and bluffing your ass off.

Seems to me this is a game that has a lot of the problems of other free / online poker games.  Players play different in these kinds of games because they have nothing real at stake.  Takes the gambling aspect out of it.  But here many players play 'corretly' and it is just fun.  All while the need to pay is non-existant.

Play this game for FREE.  It is easy to do.  It can cost you NOTHING.

GOP3 is a multiplayer poker game. They have a nice BlackJack table and a Slotmachime just to make you spend your chips. Another pay to win game. But its not bad, you can spend $10 on a HAT! there are hundreds of them. Like Im gonna wake up on a sunday morning and think.... I should spend $100 on HATS to play a poker game. YAY....awful. despicable.
Executionable file runs but game is complete Pink screen, everything is covered in pink? What is wrong with download? Have reinstalled and ran as admin, including auto-admin.

Great online poker simulator!
Dynamic and well made gameplay
Comfortable chat and a lot of cool ingame emogies
Yesterday I was diagnosed with testicular cancer. After playing this game for an extensive period of time I'm happy to report all those concerned I have made a full recovery.

Governor of Poker 3 is a fun game you can make alot of coins and play in the bigger games,,the spin wheel is great cause you get great spins..and the people are nice in the game.I recommend this game.
Had a lot of fun times playing this solo and with my friends. Just don't play blackjack. That ♥♥♥♥'s rigged.
This game is fun when you have no friends (like me).
Mouse auto-centers itself. Can't be fixed client side.
Nice multiplayer poker game to pass the time
Fun to play with friends!  Love the cartoon characters.
This is a very unique and fun poker game.
Fun poker game but avoid the microtransaction stuff.
do not play this game       no reason for banned
its a fun game to play and very exciting to play
